name: Jahanvi's LPI Explorer Agent
description: An AI agent that specializes in querying the Life Programmable Interface (LPI) to extract insights regarding Digital Twin implementations, knowledge graphs, and the S.M.I.L.E. mapping methodology. It queries the knowledge base and methodology overview to answer user queries with clear provenance.

supportedInterfaces.comment: Local subprocess communicating with LPI server.

skills.name: Digital Twin Insights Aggregator
skills.description: Generates aggregated implementation analysis by polling primary digital twin architecture sources and the S.M.I.L.E. methodology overview.
examples: What is the SMILE methodology and how do I start?
How are digital twins implemented in healthcare?

_lpiMetadata.explainability: The agent explicitly cites the LPI tools used to synthesize data and provides an exact log of tool calls and parameters in its provenance tracking footer.
